title: scoparia plebeia
intro: Scoparia plebeia, also known as Japanese thyme or Japanese tea leaf, is a perennial plant native to East Asia, particularly in China, Japan, and Korea. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Scoparia plebeia include reducing fever, alleviating symptoms of bronchitis and asthma, and improving digestion. In herbal preparations, Scoparia plebeia is often made into teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be taken orally or used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
